CustomField.inlineHelpText: Manually set by reps to show the reason for the grad date override
CustomField.label: Grad Date Removal Reasoning

value.fullName: Date stamped due to old process
value.label: Date stamped due to old process

value.fullName: Date stamped due to incorrect CE populated at CW
value.label: Date stamped due to incorrect CE populated at CW

value.fullName: Date stamped due to admin adding kids in wrong status too early
value.label: Date stamped due to admin adding kids in wrong status too early
